name: Phoenix Mortgage Lender Jimmy V NMLS# 184169
description_short: Jimmy Vercellino at Luminate Bank is a mortgage originator serving nationwide clients with conventional, FHA, VA, construction, and jumbo home loans.
description_long:
Jimmy Vercellino is an experienced mortgage originator operating under NMLS# 184169 with Luminate Bank, a Phoenix-based mortgage lender. According to Mortgage Executive Magazine, he was recognized as a top 1% mortgage loan originator in the US in 2019. His practice centers on helping families navigate the home loan process with personalized service and custom-tailored mortgage solutions.

The company offers five primary loan products: conventional loans with fixed rates and 20% down payment options, FHA loans designed for first-time homebuyers with 3.5% down payment requirements, VA loans for active and past military members with no down payment or PMI, Construction-to-Permanent (C2P) loans that allow borrowers to lock in rates during construction, and jumbo loans for loan amounts exceeding conforming limits. All loans are available at fixed or adjustable rates over standard terms.

Vercellino's approach emphasizes learning client priorities to deliver custom solutions rather than one-size-fits-all products. The team markets a timely and efficient loan process and serves families nationwide from the Phoenix area. Educational content on their blog addresses buyer education topics including rent vs. buy decisions, local vs. out-of-state lender considerations, and market analysis.

As a mortgage originator rather than a wholesale lender, Vercellino's capacity and loan product flexibility depend on Luminate Bank's underwriting standards and investor guidelines. The website lacks specific information about rates, fees, processing timelines, or credit score minimums beyond general descriptions of loan types. VA and FHA loan details emphasize benefits but do not address potential drawbacks or rate premiums.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Recognized as top 1% mortgage loan originator nationally in 2019 by Mortgage Executive Magazine
Offers five distinct loan products including VA loans with no down payment or PMI for military members
FHA loans available with only 3.5% down payment for first-time homebuyers with lower credit score requirements
Nationwide service capability beyond Phoenix area only
Emphasizes personalized, custom-tailored approach based on individual borrower priorities
C2P construction financing allows borrowers to lock in interest rate during construction phase
Educational blog content on mortgage and home buying topics for buyer guidance
cons: Website does not disclose specific interest rates, fees, or closing cost estimates for comparison shopping
No information provided about processing timelines or average loan approval duration
Jumbo loans require minimum 700 credit score and stricter terms with higher interest rates, limiting accessibility
Limited transparency on PMI costs for conventional loans with less than 20% down payment
No online application portal or digital loan status tracking mentioned on website
best_for: Military members and veterans seeking VA loans with no down payment requirements
First-time homebuyers with limited savings looking for FHA loans with 3.5% down
Borrowers seeking to finance new home construction through C2P loans
High-net-worth borrowers needing jumbo loans above conforming limits
diagnosis: Best for nationwide borrowers seeking personalized mortgage origination, especially military members (VA loans), first-time buyers (FHA), or those with non-standard financing needs like construction financing. Primary caveat: website lacks transparent rate, fee, and timeline information necessary for informed comparison shopping, requiring direct contact for specific loan terms.
services: Conventional mortgage loans with fixed interest rates
FHA loans for first-time homebuyers with 3.5% minimum down payment
VA loans for active and past military members
Jumbo loans for amounts exceeding conforming loan limits
Fixed and adjustable rate mortgage options
Mortgage consultation and loan type comparison
Personalized mortgage solutions based on borrower priorities
Educational content on mortgage rates and home buying decisions
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3602 E Campbell Ave Suite 1, Phoenix, AZ 85018
